calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
Shelley G. Bryant, Esq. for Plaintiff Paul Easterday.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Phase Two Strategies, Inc., William F. Boehlke and Christine A. Boehlke as follows:
Damages of $35,196.06
Attorney's fees of $3,331.25
Costs of $404.50
Interest of $1,865.43
For the total of $40,797.24
Judgment signed in open court.
